title: Operation
description: Describes a single API operation on a path.

__schema0.title: tags
__schema0.description: A list of tags for API documentation grouping.

__schema2.title: summary
__schema2.description: A short summary of the operation. Keep under ~120 characters.

__schema3.title: description
__schema3.description: A verbose description. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema4.title: operationId
__schema4.description: Unique identifier for the operation. Used for code generation.

__schema5.title: parameters
__schema5.description: Parameters for this operation, combined with path-level parameters.

__schema7.title: Reference Object
__schema7.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

examples.description: A user is a type of person.
A pet is a type of animal.
A pet is a type of animal.

__schema8.title: Reference
__schema8.description: A reference to another component in the specification.

__schema12.title: summary
__schema12.description: A short summary which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema13.title: description
__schema13.description: A description which by default SHOULD override that of the referenced component.

__schema16.title: name
__schema16.description: The name of the query parameter. Case-sensitive.

__schema18.title: description
__schema18.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema23.description: Allows empty values (?param=). Deprecated in favor of schema-level validation.
__schema23.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema26.title: explode
__schema26.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema27.description: When true, allows reserved characters without percent-encoding.
__schema27.title: allowReserved

__schema30.title: Schema Object
__schema30.description: A Schema Object defines the shape of a JSON value.

__schema31.title: String Object
__schema31.description: A String Object defines the shape of a string value.

__schema32.title: title
__schema32.description: A title for the schema, used for documentation.

__schema33.title: description
__schema33.description: A description of the schema. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema34.title: default
__schema34.description: The default value for this schema.

__schema35.title: example
__schema35.description: An example value for this schema.

__schema36.title: enum
__schema36.description: An array of valid values for this schema.

__schema39.title: Discriminator
__schema39.description: When request bodies or response payloads may be one of a number of different schemas, a discriminator object can be used to aid in serialization, deserialization, and validation.

__schema40.title: propertyName
__schema40.description: The name of the property in the payload that will hold the discriminator value.

__schema41.title: mapping
__schema41.description: An object to hold mappings between payload values and schema names or references.

__schema46.title: XML
__schema46.description: A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.

__schema47.title: name
__schema47.description: Replaces the name of the element/attribute used for the described schema property.

__schema48.title: namespace
__schema48.description: The URI of the namespace definition.

__schema49.title: prefix
__schema49.description: The prefix to be used for the name.

__schema50.description: Declares whether the property definition translates to an attribute instead of an element.
__schema50.title: attribute

__schema52.description: May be used only for an array definition. Signifies whether the array is wrapped or not.
__schema52.title: wrapped

__schema56.title: ExternalDocumentation
__schema56.description: Allows referencing an external resource for extended documentation.

__schema57.title: description
__schema57.description: A short description of the target documentation.

__schema58.title: url
__schema58.description: The URL for the target documentation.

__schema60.title: readOnly
__schema60.description: When true, the property is only returned in responses, not accepted in requests.

__schema61.title: writeOnly
__schema61.description: When true, the property is only accepted in requests, not returned in responses.

__schema62.title: deprecated
__schema62.description: When true, indicates this schema is deprecated and should be avoided.

__schema63.title: nullable
__schema63.description: OpenAPI 3.0: Set to true to allow null values.

__schema65.title: format
__schema65.description: Semantic format hint for string values. Common formats: date-time, email, uuid, uri, hostname, ipv4, byte, binary.

__schema66.title: Pattern
__schema66.description: A regular expression pattern the string must match.

__schema72.title: Number Object
__schema72.description: A Number Object defines the shape of a number value.

__schema74.title: format
__schema74.description: Number precision format. Use 'float' for 32-bit single-precision or 'double' (default) for 64-bit double-precision IEEE 754.

__schema75.title: multipleOf
__schema75.description: Require the number to be a multiple of this value.

__schema77.title: minimum
__schema77.description: Inclusive lower bound for the number.

__schema79.title: maximum
__schema79.description: Inclusive upper bound for the number.

__schema81.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema81.description: When true, the minimum value is exclusive (value must be > minimum).

__schema83.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema83.description: When true, the maximum value is exclusive (value must be < maximum).

__schema85.title: Integer Object
__schema85.description: An Integer Object defines the shape of an integer value.

__schema87.title: format
__schema87.description: Integer size format. Use 'int32' for signed 32-bit (-2B to 2B) or 'int64' for signed 64-bit integers.

__schema88.title: multipleOf
__schema88.description: Require the integer to be a multiple of this value.

__schema90.title: minimum
__schema90.description: Inclusive lower bound for the integer.

__schema92.title: maximum
__schema92.description: Inclusive upper bound for the integer.

__schema94.title: exclusiveMinimum
__schema94.description: When true, the minimum value is exclusive (value must be > minimum).

__schema96.title: exclusiveMaximum
__schema96.description: When true, the maximum value is exclusive (value must be < maximum).

__schema98.title: Boolean Object
__schema98.description: A Boolean Object defines the shape of a boolean value.

__schema100.title: Array Object
__schema100.description: An Array Object defines the shape of an array value.

__schema110.title: Object Object
__schema110.description: An Object Object defines the shape of an object value.

__schema122.title: Composition Schema
__schema122.description: A schema using composition keywords (allOf, anyOf, oneOf, not) without a type constraint.

__schema123.title: allOf
__schema123.description: Require the instance to validate against all subschemas.

__schema125.title: anyOf
__schema125.description: Require the instance to validate against at least one subschema.

__schema127.title: oneOf
__schema127.description: Require the instance to validate against exactly one subschema.

__schema129.title: not
__schema129.description: Require the instance to NOT validate against the given subschema.

__schema132.title: examples
__schema132.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema139.title: externalValue
__schema139.description: A URL that points to the literal example.

__schema141.title: content
__schema141.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema143.title: MediaType
__schema143.description: Each Media Type Object provides schema and examples for the media type identified by its key.

__schema151.title: Encoding
__schema151.description: A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.

__schema152.title: contentType
__schema152.description: The Content-Type for encoding a specific property.

__schema155.title: Header
__schema155.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema156.title: Header
__schema156.description: The Header Object follows the structure of the Parameter Object.

__schema157.title: description
__schema157.description: A brief description of the parameter.

__schema158.description: Determines whether this parameter is mandatory.
__schema158.title: required

__schema160.description: Specifies that a parameter is deprecated.
__schema160.title: deprecated

__schema162.description: Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters.
__schema162.title: allowEmptyValue

__schema164.title: style
__schema164.description: Describes how the parameter value will be serialized.

__schema191.title: name
__schema191.description: The name of the path parameter. Must match a template expression in the path.

__schema193.title: description
__schema193.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema194.description: Path parameters must always be required.
__schema194.title: required

__schema198.title: explode
__schema198.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema201.title: examples
__schema201.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema203.title: content
__schema203.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema207.title: name
__schema207.description: The name of the header. Case-insensitive.

__schema209.title: description
__schema209.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema214.title: style
__schema214.description: Serialization style. Only 'simple' is valid for headers.

__schema215.title: explode
__schema215.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema218.title: examples
__schema218.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema220.title: content
__schema220.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema226.title: description
__schema226.description: A description of the parameter. CommonMark syntax MAY be used.

__schema231.title: style
__schema231.description: Serialization style. Only 'form' is valid for cookies.

__schema232.title: explode
__schema232.description: For arrays/objects. When true, each value gets its own parameter.

__schema235.title: examples
__schema235.description: Multiple named examples. Mutually exclusive with 'example'.

__schema237.title: content
__schema237.description: For complex parameters. Mutually exclusive with 'schema'.

__schema250.title: responses
__schema250.description: REQUIRED. The responses for this operation.

__schema252.title: Response
__schema252.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema253.title: Response
__schema253.description: Describes a single response from an API Operation.

__schema261.title: Link
__schema261.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema262.title: Link
__schema262.description: The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.

__schema263.title: operationId
__schema263.description: The name of an existing, resolvable OAS operation, as defined with a unique operationId.

__schema264.title: operationRef
__schema264.description: A relative or absolute URI reference to an OAS operation.

__schema265.title: parameters
__schema265.description: A map representing parameters to pass to an operation as specified with operationId or identified via operationRef.

__schema268.title: requestBody
__schema268.description: A literal value or {expression} to use as a request body when calling the target operation.

__schema272.title: url
__schema272.description: A URL to the target host. Supports server variables in {braces}. May be relative.

__schema273.title: description
__schema273.description: An optional description of the server.

__schema274.title: variables
__schema274.description: A map of server variables for URL template substitution.

__schema276.title: ServerVariable
__schema276.description: A server variable for URL template substitution. Use {variableName} in the server URL.

__schema277.title: enum
__schema277.description: An enumeration of valid string values for this variable.

__schema279.title: default
__schema279.description: The default value for substitution if not supplied.

__schema280.title: description
__schema280.description: An optional description for the server variable.

__schema287.title: Callback
__schema287.description: A map of possible out-of-band callbacks related to the parent operation.

__schema288.title: Callback
__schema288.description: A map of possible out-of-band callbacks related to the parent operation.

__schema290.title: PathItem
__schema290.description: Describes the operations available on a single path.

__schema308.title: deprecated
__schema308.description: Marks this operation as deprecated. Defaults to false.

__schema310.title: security
__schema310.description: Security requirements for this operation. Overrides root-level security.

items.title: SecurityRequirement
items.description: Lists the required security schemes for this operation.
